# Security — Prompts

Prompt collection for **Security**.

| Title | App | Use Case | Difficulty |
| ----- | --- | -------- | ---------- |
| [Alert Triage — Is This a True Positive?](../../_canonical/alert-triage-is-this-a-true-positive.md) | Security Copilot | Use to quickly assess whether an alert warrants escalation before spending time on full investigation. | intermediate |
| [Audit Log Export Summary — User Activity](../../_canonical/audit-log-export-summary-user-activity.md) | Security Copilot | Use when responding to an internal or external audit request for user activity records. | intermediate |
| [CISO Board Report — Security Posture](../../_canonical/ciso-board-report-security-posture.md) | Security Copilot | Use quarterly for board-level security reporting. | intermediate |
| [Compliance Posture Summary — Microsoft Purview](../../_canonical/compliance-posture-summary-microsoft-purview.md) | Security Copilot | Use for quarterly compliance reviews or ahead of external audits. | intermediate |
| [Conditional Access Gap Analysis](../../_canonical/conditional-access-gap-analysis.md) | Security Copilot | Use to identify users who may be operating outside conditional access policy coverage. | intermediate |
| [Daily Threat Digest](../../_canonical/daily-threat-digest.md) | Security Copilot | Use to produce a consistent daily threat summary for the SOC team or security leadership. | intermediate |
| [Data Retention and DLP Policy Coverage Check](../../_canonical/data-retention-and-dlp-policy-coverage-check.md) | Security Copilot | Use to verify that DLP and retention policies cover your critical data types before an audit. | intermediate |
| [Device Investigation — Rapid Scope](../../_canonical/device-investigation-rapid-scope.md) | Security Copilot | Use to quickly establish what a device has been doing around the time of an alert before deciding whether to isolate. | intermediate |
| [DLP Alert Investigation](../../_canonical/dlp-alert-investigation.md) | Security Copilot | Use to investigate a data loss prevention alert before deciding on escalation or user notification. | intermediate |
| [Email Threat Analysis](../../_canonical/email-threat-analysis.md) | Security Copilot | Use to investigate a suspicious email that has been reported or flagged by Defender for Office 365. | intermediate |
| [Executive Security Briefing (Non-Technical)](../../_canonical/executive-security-briefing-non-technical.md) | Security Copilot | Use when you need to communicate security posture or an incident to a non-technical audience. | intermediate |
| [First Look — Incident Summary](../../_canonical/first-look-incident-summary.md) | Security Copilot | Use when a new high-severity incident lands and you need a fast, structured overview before diving in. | intermediate |
| [Hunting — Lateral Movement via SMB/PsExec](../../_canonical/hunting-lateral-movement-via-smb-psexec.md) | Security Copilot | Use to identify potential lateral movement patterns in your environment. | advanced |
| [Hunting — Persistence Mechanisms](../../_canonical/hunting-persistence-mechanisms.md) | Security Copilot | Use when investigating a suspected compromise and you want to check for persistence before containment. | advanced |
| [Hunting — Suspicious PowerShell Execution](../../_canonical/hunting-suspicious-powershell-execution.md) | Security Copilot | Use to hunt for LOLBin/PowerShell abuse patterns across your environment. | advanced |
| [Incident Post-Mortem Draft](../../_canonical/incident-post-mortem-draft.md) | Security Copilot | Use after incident closure to produce a structured post-mortem without starting from a blank page. | intermediate |
| [Insider Risk Signal Review](../../_canonical/insider-risk-signal-review.md) | Security Copilot | Use for periodic review of insider risk signals or when a user is flagged for HR/Legal review. | intermediate |
| [KQL Query Generation — Save for Reuse](../../_canonical/kql-query-generation-save-for-reuse.md) | Security Copilot | Use to generate a KQL query you can save, test, and reuse — avoiding repeated Copilot prompting for the same hunt. | advanced |
| [Monthly Vulnerability Summary for Leadership](../../_canonical/monthly-vulnerability-summary-for-leadership.md) | Security Copilot | Use at the end of each month to produce a consistent vulnerability posture report without manually pulling data. | intermediate |
| [Multi-Alert Correlation — Single Incident Thread](../../_canonical/multi-alert-correlation-single-incident-thread.md) | Security Copilot | Use when multiple alerts across different products appear related and you need to determine if they form a single attack chain. | intermediate |
| [Patch Compliance Report by Business Unit](../../_canonical/patch-compliance-report-by-business-unit.md) | Security Copilot | Use to track patch compliance across organisational units and identify which teams are creating risk. | intermediate |
| [Privileged Access Review Report](../../_canonical/privileged-access-review-report.md) | Security Copilot | Use for quarterly privileged access reviews (PAR) required by ISO 27001, SOC 2, and similar frameworks. | intermediate |
| [Privileged Account Audit](../../_canonical/privileged-account-audit.md) | Security Copilot | Use for routine checks on privileged accounts or before/after a change freeze. | intermediate |
| [Security Awareness Training Compliance Report](../../_canonical/security-awareness-training-compliance-report.md) | Security Copilot | Use to track mandatory security training completion and identify non-compliant staff before an audit. | intermediate |
| [Security Incident Communication — External Notification Draft](../../_canonical/security-incident-communication-external-notification-draft.md) | Security Copilot | Use when a breach or significant incident may require external notification (customers, regulators, or partners). | intermediate |
| [Security Metrics Dashboard Preparation](../../_canonical/security-metrics-dashboard-preparation.md) | Security Copilot | Use to pull the raw metrics you need before building or updating a security dashboard or scorecard. | intermediate |
| [Security Questionnaire Response — Vendor/Customer](../../_canonical/security-questionnaire-response-vendor-customer.md) | Security Copilot | Use when a customer or vendor sends a security questionnaire and you need to draft responses grounded in your actual environment state. | intermediate |
| [Single CVE Impact Assessment](../../_canonical/single-cve-impact-assessment.md) | Security Copilot | Use when a new CVE is published or reported and you need to know your exposure fast. | intermediate |
| [Stale Account Report](../../_canonical/stale-account-report.md) | Security Copilot | Use for periodic hygiene reviews or ahead of audits — stale accounts are a common audit finding. | intermediate |
| [Third-Party Risk Summary — Vendor with Elevated Access](../../_canonical/third-party-risk-summary-vendor-with-elevated-access.md) | Security Copilot | Use when onboarding a new vendor with access to your Microsoft environment or reviewing an existing one. | intermediate |
| [Threat Intelligence Enrichment — IOC Lookup](../../_canonical/threat-intelligence-enrichment-ioc-lookup.md) | Security Copilot | Use to enrich an IOC (IP, domain, file hash) with threat intelligence context before deciding on response actions. | intermediate |
| [User Investigation — Credential Compromise Assessment](../../_canonical/user-investigation-credential-compromise-assessment.md) | Security Copilot | Use when a user account shows anomalous behaviour or is referenced in an alert. | intermediate |
| [Vulnerability Prioritisation](../../_canonical/vulnerability-prioritisation.md) | Security Copilot | Use to cut through a long vulnerability list and focus remediation effort on what matters most. | intermediate |
| [Weekly Threat Landscape Briefing](../../_canonical/weekly-threat-landscape-briefing.md) | Security Copilot | Use to produce a consistent weekly threat briefing for the security leadership team. | intermediate |
| [Zero-Day and Active Exploit Exposure Check](../../_canonical/zero-day-and-active-exploit-exposure-check.md) | Security Copilot | Use immediately when a new zero-day or actively exploited CVE is announced. | intermediate |
